title: [] [推到完場] Apple Special Event October 2018 (2)

replies.msg:
(值得注意嘅係今次website有超多個唔同嘅Apple logo，每次refresh都會有另一個design )


日期: 2018年10月30日晚
時間: 10點
地點: BAM Howard Gilman Opera House

預計流程:
- 聽歌
- 播片, wow
- Tim Cook 經典 Good morning x 3, wow
- 打埋上次未打嗰啲飛機
- Full screen iPad Pro
- MacBook/MacBook Air Update
- Airpower Airpods update
- One more thing? (Mac Mini)
- 聽歌
半個鐘就完Mac應該後面仲有好多嘢
